rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to June 11, 2013 by stipulation of Counsel, no review. Please note, this court does not sign Stip and Orders, so the Stipulation was filed as such, no order. In addition, this court does not have fax and file and faxing documents to the Examiner for processing is not acceptable. In the future, documents faxed directly to the Probate Examiner will not be processed.
